homeHero.title: Shkarpetorei
homeHero.description: Buy socks — warm your feet and your soul.
homeHero.description2:
/shkar·pet·ka/ is a Ukrainian word meaning 'sock'.
Handmade with love. Every sock is unique.
homeHero.subtitle: All profits and a lot of socks go to Ukrainian defenders.

homeEvents.title: Coordinates of comfortable socks
homeEvents.description: We often join local markets where you can see our socks in real life, feel the handmade work, find your pair and a lot more.

homeAbout.title: Sockology
homeAbout.description:
The science of warmth, comfort and proper socks.

Research conducted by a mom and a grandma.
No lab coats, just love.
homeAbout.button: Take a look behind the scenes

shop.title: Sock heaven
shop.description: Tiny knots that warm your heart
shop.sortPriceAsc: From cozy budget to fancy warmth
shop.total: We have {{quantity}} interesting items waiting for you!

events.title: Coordinates of comfortable socks
events.description:
We regularly take part in markets and fairs where you can see our socks in real life, feel their texture and choose your special pair.

It’s more than shopping — it’s small moments, filled with warmth, conversations and atmosphere.

There is always Ukrainian music — and often, we sing ourselves.

It’s more than socks.
It’s a little piece of home.

eventNext.description: Come say hi and find your perfect pair 🧦

archievments.title: Our socks archievments
archievments.description:
With your support, we can do more.

Every purchase helps Ukrainian defenders and brings warmth where it truly matters.

Our defenders send their sincere thanks for your support.

It means more than just socks.

about.title: Sockology
about.description:
We are two experts in warmth:
a mom and a grandma.

Our research continues every day:
how to make socks softer, warmer and better for living.

No labs.
No complex formulas.
Just yarn, hands and love.

Each pair carries hours of work, a bit of patience and a lot of care.

footer.disclamer: This is a learning project built to practice React and Tailwind CSS. It is inspired by a warm and amazing family in North Rhine-Westphalia (NRW), Germany. They regularly create handmade items and share them for local markets in NRW, or send them directly to Ukraine. This is NOT a real e-commerce store. No real online sales or payments take place in this project. If you want to support Ukraine a little - come to visit them at the market and buy some cute items for your soul. 😌
